purpose: Maintain a single, trustworthy source of truth for everything I need to do across all parts of my life.
deliverable: An ongoing system, used continuously. The deliverable is the system itself, not a one-shot artifact.
scope_in: Areas of responsibility I want to track over time
scope_out: Calendar and time-blocking (lives in a calendar app)
success_criteria: At any moment, I can see what I should be doing now (state=doing)
At any moment, I can see what's on deck (state=next) without overwhelming detail
Items I'm not ready for don't clutter my view (someday, waiting)
Nothing falls through the cracks: capture is fast and trusted
Weekly review has a clear surface to operate on
